# portal.voyage (portal.voyage)

> Where on Earth should you live? A data-driven map that ranks every city for you, the spiritual successor to Teleport and Nomad List.

You build a character (budget, field, and the people you admire), and portal.voyage scores every city on the three things that actually decide it: your runway (cost of living), your career upside, and your people (where the people you admire cluster). It treats Earth as an open world where every city is a DLC your passport unlocks. The people axis is weighted highest by default, because that is the part Nomad List never nailed.

It is for anyone deciding where to live to do their best work, afford a good life, and be near their people: remote workers, founders, and anyone making the biggest decision nobody helps you make with data. This is an early v0: one interactive tool on the homepage, backed by curated and approximate data, meant to start the search, not end it.

## Key links
- [Home](https://portal.voyage/): the hero, the interactive decision tool (sliders, budget, field, and admired people), the three axes explained, and an honesty note about the data.

## About
- Part of adam.inc, the internet portfolio of Adam Pangelinan (Anchor Marianas LLC).
- Builder: https://adampang.com
